name: Gemini Space Station, Inc.
summary: PART I . Gemini Overview Our mission is to build the bridge to the future of money and markets. Gemini is a trusted cryptocurrency platform building secure financial infrastructure for the next generation of money and markets, providing access for individuals and institutions to a financial future that is more open, fair, and secure.
